name: Little Bear
overview: Follows a young bear as he goes on exciting adventures in the forest, gets into trouble and learns new things with his friends, including Emily, Duck, Hen, Cat, and Owl. His parents are Mother Bear, who is always there when he needs her, and Father Bear, a fisherman who is often at sea. Based on books by Else Holmelund Minarik.

trailers.title: Maurice Sendak's Little Bear (1998) Promo - Nickelodeon - Nick JR
